metadata.homeTitle: BTH Expert — Certified Environmental Consultancy | Oran
metadata.homeDescription: Environmental consultancy certified by the Algerian Ministry of Environment. Impact assessments, hazard studies, HSE audits and regulatory compliance in Oran and across Algeria.

meta.title: Environmental Consultancy in Oran — BTH Expert
meta.description: BTH Expert, certified environmental consultancy based in Oran (Bir El Djir). Impact assessments, hazard studies and HSE audits for industrial projects in Oran and western Algeria.

hero.heading: Environmental consultancy in Oran
hero.subheading: Certified by the Ministry of Environment, BTH Expert supports industrial, mining and infrastructure project owners in the wilaya of Oran and across western Algeria.

services.heading: Our services in Oran
services.description: From the project instruction phase through to environmental monitoring during operations, BTH Expert delivers studies compliant with the applicable Algerian regulatory framework.

zones.heading: Service areas
zones.description: Based in Bir El Djir, Oran, BTH Expert operates across all wilayas of western Algeria.

cta.heading: Your project in Oran
cta.description: Send us your project details. We assess your regulatory obligations and propose a tailored offer.

hero.eyebrow: Certified by the Ministry of Environment · Oran, Algeria
hero.subheading: Certified consultancy since 2009. Impact assessments, hazard studies, HSE audits — from project inception to regulatory compliance.

items.title: Environmental Impact Assessment
items.description: Comprehensive evaluation of environmental impacts for industrial, mining and infrastructure projects. Report compliant with Ministry of Environment requirements.

items.title: Hazard Study
items.description: Major risk analysis for classified establishments. Accident scenarios, effect zones, prevention measures and emergency plans.

items.title: HSE Audit
items.description: Health, safety and environment compliance diagnosis. Identification of regulatory gaps and prioritised action plan.

items.title: Environmental Management Plan
items.description: Definition of mitigation and environmental monitoring measures throughout the project lifecycle.

equipe.heading: Experts recognised by the Ministry
equipe.description: Accredited engineers with deep mastery of the Algerian regulatory framework and international ISO/IEC standards. BTH Expert operates in partnership with BTH Consult for regional-scale projects.

contact.heading: A project underway? Let's talk.
contact.description: Tell us about your project, your regulatory constraints and your timeline. We respond within 48 hours.
